Highlights

A psalter from Royal libraries

Psalter. Latin, Parchment, 185 ff., 245x177 mm. Northern England, 1190-1200. Leiden, UB : ms. BPL 76 A

Read more

Flemish surgical instruments

Small manual for a surgeon, based on the Cyrurgie by Meester Jan Yperman (incomplete). Flemish. Paper, 130x95 mm. Flanders, last quarter of the 15th century. Leiden, UB : ms. BPL 3094

Read more

The Zwolle bible

Bible. Latin. Parchment, 6 volumes, c. 530x390 mm. Brethren of the Common Life, Zwolle, 1464-1476. Utrecht, UB : Cat 31 and 15.C.11

Read more

The Utrecht Psalter

Psalter. Latin. Parchment, 91 ff., 330x255 mm. Benedictine monastery of St. Peter, Hautvillers near Reims, c. 820-835. Utrecht, UB : Cat. 32 / 1

Read more

A child’s alphabet

Alphabet and prayers. Latin. Parchment, 4 ff., 208x151 mm. South Holland, c. 1480. The Hague, MM : ms. 10 D 34

Read more

Scribe and corrector

Titus Lucretius Carus, De Rerum Natura libri VI. Latin. Parchment, 192 ff., 325x210 mm. Northwestern France (Charlemagne's palace school), early 9th century. Leiden, UB : ms. VLF 30

Read more

Lunar eclipses between 1425 and 1462

Almanac. Latin. Parchment, 19 ff., 145 x 110 mm, folded to 75 x 55 mm. Northern France, 1425. Leiden, UB : ms. VUL 100 C

Read more

The legend of the Holy Cross of Breda

Legends and miracles of the Holy Cross of Breda. Dutch. Parchment, 20 ff., 240x160 mm. Breda, second half 15th or first half 16th century. Breda, GA : Archieven Barbaraparochie Breda, afd. III-103. ms. 144

Read more

Genealogy of the Kings of England

Genealogy of the Kings of England and other texts. Anglo-Norman, Middle English and Latin. Parchment roll, 2310x230 mm. England (?), last quarter 13th century and 1430-1440. The Hague, KB : ms. 75 A 2 / 2

Read more

The Necrology of Monastery Nieuwlicht in Utrecht

Henricus Bor, Necrology and chronicle of the monastery Nieuwlicht (Nova Lux). Latin. Parchment, 70 ff., 300x195 mm. Utrecht, 1440-1550. Utrecht, HUA: Kartuizerklooster Nieuwlicht, inv.nr. 4

Read more

A historian at work

Petrus de Thimo, Brabantsche Yeesten. Latin and Dutch. Paper and parchment, 210 ff., c. 280xc. 212 mm. c. 1425. Leiden, UB : ms. Ltk 1019

Read more

The Keppel Fragment

Quintus Septimius Tertullianus, De spectaculis. Latin. Parchment, 1 f., 336xc.255 mm. Cologne, early 9th century. Arnhem, Huisarchief Keppel

Read more

Stamped miniatures

Book of hours. Latin. Parchment, 99 ff. 150x110 (83x62) mm. Bruges, c. 1430-1450. The Hague, KB : ms. 135 K 45
